sections.paragraph:
verb לחכוך

to vacillate, hesitate; rub, abrade, scratch

verb לחכך

to rub, scratch; clear one's throat, gurgle, expectorate

verb חוכך (>>חֻכַּךְ)

be rubbed, scratched

verb להתחכך

to rub oneself; brush against; argue

verb לחכך (>>חיכך)

to rub, scratch; clear one's throat, gurgle, expectorate
